description: Sepolia USDC → Falcon USDC bridge. Deposit from any external EVM wallet (MetaMask, etc.) — no ETH wallet built into Falcon wallet.

steps: Connect MetaMask (or any wallet) to Sepolia
Approve USDC spend for the lock contract
Call deposit(amount, yourFalconAddress) on the lock contract
Validators attest the deposit and mint Falcon USDC to your address
deposit_flow.note: You do not need ETH support inside the Falcon wallet. Use your existing EVM wallet for the Sepolia side only.
